title: Milkdown serializer configuration with round-trip fidelity plugins
purpose: Provides plugins to override Milkdown's default markdown serialization behavior and preserve original marker characters and formatting during parse-to-string round-trips.
module_context: Exports an array of Milkdown plugins that modify remark-stringify options and override default schemas for emphasis, strong, bullet lists, ordered lists, list items, headings, and hard breaks to maintain fidelity with original markdown conventions.

steps.content: Update the remark stringify options context to customize bullet list markers and emphasis/strong formatting.
Override the text handler to unescape benign characters while preserving literal backslashes.
Customize break node handling to preserve original line-break styles (spaces, backslash, or html).
Implement a custom join function to control blank line spacing based on raw trailing data.
Process input string character by character to identify and unescape benign escape sequences.
Preserve literal backslashes by detecting '\\' patterns and maintaining them as double backslashes.
Remove backslash prefixes from specific characters (*, _, ~, #) that are normally escaped in markdown.

methods.name: customTextHandler
methods.normalized_params: (node: any, parent: any, state: any, info: any): string

steps.content: Invoke the previous text handler or fallback to safe text generation.
Apply the unescape function to the original text output to restore benign characters.
Define a custom emphasis mark schema that preserves the original markdown marker character.
Configure parsing from DOM elements to extract marker attributes.
Configure DOM rendering to include marker data attributes.
Implement markdown parsing and serialization to maintain marker fidelity.
Define a custom strong mark schema that preserves the original markdown marker character.
Configure parsing from DOM elements to extract marker attributes.
Configure DOM rendering to include marker data attributes.
Implement markdown parsing and serialization to maintain marker fidelity.
Define a custom bullet list node schema that preserves the original bullet character.
Configure parsing from DOM elements to extract bullet attributes.
Configure DOM rendering to include bullet data attributes.
Implement markdown parsing and serialization to maintain bullet fidelity.
Define a custom ordered list node schema that preserves the original marker character and start number.
Configure parsing from DOM elements to extract marker and start attributes.
Configure DOM rendering to include marker and start data attributes.
Implement markdown parsing and serialization to maintain marker and start number fidelity.
Define a custom list item node schema that controls spread behavior per item.
Configure parsing from DOM elements to extract item attributes including spread and raw trailing data.
Configure DOM rendering to include appropriate data attributes.
Implement markdown parsing and serialization to control item spread and preserve raw trailing data.
Define a custom heading node schema that preserves raw trailing whitespace/newline data.
Configure parsing from DOM elements to extract heading attributes including raw trailing data.
Configure DOM rendering to include heading level and id attributes.
Implement markdown parsing and serialization to maintain raw trailing data for spacing control.
Define a custom hard break node schema that preserves the original line-break style.
Configure parsing from DOM elements to extract style attributes.
Configure DOM rendering to include appropriate style data attributes.
Implement markdown parsing and serialization to maintain original break style.
